debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
hmax : IsMin D
x y : PersistenceSubmodule M
hxy : Disjoint x y
hN : x ⊔ y ∈ D
hx : ¬x = ⊥
hy : ¬y = ⊥
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M) := ⋯
⊢ ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), N = sSup (B N hN)

proof: (fun N hN => by dsimp [B]; split_ifs <;> simp [*, sSup_pair, sSup_singleton])
failed_attempts: (fun N hN ↦ by split_ifs with h <;> simp [h])
(fun N hN => by split_ifs with h <;> simp [h, sSup_pair])
(fun N hN => by dsimp [B]; split_ifs with h <;> simp [h, sSup_pair, sSup_singleton]) sorry sorry sorry
(fun N _ => by dsimp [B]; split_ifs with h <;> simp [h, sSup_pair, sSup_singleton]) sorry sorry sorry
(fun N hN => by dsimp [B]; split_ifs with h; simp [h, sSup_pair])
successful_attempts: (fun N hN => by dsimp [B]; split_ifs <;> simp [*, sSup_pair, sSup_singleton])
(fun N hN => by dsimp [B]; split_ifs with h <;> simp [h, sSup_pair])
(fun N hN ↦ by dsimp [B]; split_ifs <;> simp [*])
(fun N hN => by by_cases h : N = x ⊔ y <;> simp [B, h])
(fun N _ ↦ by dsimp [B]; split_ifs with h; subst h; simp; simp)
(fun N _ ↦ by dsimp [B]; split_ifs with h <;> simp [h, sSup_pair])
(fun N hN => by simp [B]; split_ifs with h <;> simp [h, sSup_pair])
(fun N hN ↦ by dsimp [B]; split_ifs with h <;> simp [h, sSup_pair, sSup_singleton])
(fun N hN ↦ by dsimp [B]; split_ifs <;> simp [*])
(fun N _ ↦ by dsimp [B]; split_ifs with h <;> simp [h])
(fun N hN ↦ by dsimp [B]; split_ifs <;> simp [*])
(fun N hN ↦ by simp [B]; split_ifs <;> simp [*])
(fun N hN ↦ by simp [B]; split_ifs with h <;> simp [h])
(fun N hN ↦ by dsimp [B]; split_ifs with h <;> simp [h, sSup_pair, sSup_singleton])
(fun N hN ↦ by dsimp [B]; split_ifs <;> simp [*])
(fun N hN => by by_cases h : N = x ⊔ y <;> simp [B, h])
(fun N hN => by dsimp [B]; split_ifs <;> simp [*])
(fun N hN ↦ by dsimp [B]; split_ifs with h <;> simp [h, sSup_pair, sSup_singleton])
(fun N hN => by simp [B]; split_ifs with h <;> simp [*])
(fun N hN ↦ by dsimp [B]; split_ifs with h <;> simp [h, sSup_pair])
(fun N hN ↦ by simp [B]; split_ifs <;> simp [*])
(fun N hN ↦ by dsimp [B]; split_ifs <;> simp [sSup_pair, sSup_singleton, *])
(fun N hN => by dsimp [B]; split_ifs with h <;> simp [h, sSup_pair])
